MOTION To Compel The Deposition Of Pltf
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John D. Knadler, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Plant Insulation Co.
Jennifer Alesio, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Zenon Kuzmicky

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as modified: Defendant Plant Insulation Company's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff is denied. The court finds no evidence that supports a finding that the deposition ended based upon a agreement to resume at a later date or that Plaintiff requested an early recess.
MODIFICATION:
Late opposition has been considered. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
